title: capsicum indicum var. ovatum
intro: Capsicum indicum var. ovatum, also known as the Round Indian Pepper or Round Capsicum, is a variety of pepper plant that is characterized by its rounded or ovate fruit. The medicinal properties of Capsicum indicum var. ovatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing pain and inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. Capsicum indicum var. ovatum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, sore muscles, and other conditions.
